name: codboard
description: Give Claude an audited task board for the tickets it works, with strong automatic sync: turn a ticket into a request, break it into tasks, drive them to done, and keep status, branch, PR and the daily report in sync — then watch open PRs, drain agent directives (requested PR create/merge), and act on new comments. `/codboard:init` binds a repo to its project; deterministic hooks inject the workflow at session start, block a turn from ending while a milestone is unsynced, and block a merge that violates the project's policy. Bundles the CodBoard MCP server and its watcher workflow as on-demand skills.
